# EasyProtein

EasyProtein is an R package for streamlined proteomics data analysis and
visualization.

## Features

- data import and preprocessing
- quality control
- PCA and clustering
- differential expression analysis
- pathway enrichment
- publication-ready plotting

## Get started

Install EasyProtein from GitHub:

\`\`\`r remotes::install_github(“yuanlizhanshi/EasyProtein”)

# Package index

## Data import and preprocessing

- [`fix_duplicate_protein_ids()`](fix_duplicate_protein_ids.md) : Fix
  duplicated protein IDs
- [`rawdata2se()`](rawdata2se.md) : Construct a SummarizedExperiment
  object from raw expression table
- [`impute_low1pct_or_median_raw()`](impute_low1pct_or_median_raw.md) :
  Impute missing values in raw intensity using low-percentile sampling
  or geometric mean
- [`calculate_cv()`](calculate_cv.md) : Calculate coefficient of
  variation
- [`calc_gene_CV_by_condition()`](calc_gene_CV_by_condition.md) :
  Calculate coefficient of variation (CV) for each gene per condition
- [`calc_gene_mean_by_condition()`](calc_gene_mean_by_condition.md) :
  Calculate mean expression per gene per condition
- [`summarize_se_by_coldata()`](summarize_se_by_coldata.md) : Summarize
  assay values by groups in colData(se)
- [`se2raw()`](se2raw.md) : Convert SummarizedExperiment to raw
  intensity data.frame
- [`se2internstiy()`](se2internstiy.md) : Convert SummarizedExperiment
  to intensity data.frame
- [`se2conc()`](se2conc.md) : Convert SummarizedExperiment to
  concentration (CPM) data.frame
- [`se2DEGs()`](se2DEGs.md) : Extract DEG results from
  SummarizedExperiment
- [`se2gene_group()`](se2gene_group.md) : Assign genes into dynamic
  groups based on expression, correlation, and CV
- [`se2scale()`](se2scale.md) : Convert SummarizedExperiment to z-scaled
  CPM data.frame
- [`scale_mtx()`](scale_mtx.md) : Scale matrix by row

## Analysis

- [`limma_protein_DE()`](limma_protein_DE.md) : Limma-based differential
  expression analysis for proteomics (unpaired)
- [`limma_protein_DE_pair()`](limma_protein_DE_pair.md) : Paired
  differential expression analysis using limma
- [`enrichment_analysis()`](enrichment_analysis.md) : Functional
  enrichment analysis (GO / KEGG)
- [`run_gsea()`](run_gsea.md) : Run GSEA (Gene Set Enrichment Analysis)
- [`run_mfuzz_clustering()`](run_mfuzz_clustering.md) : Perform fuzzy
  clustering on gene-level time-course matrix using Mfuzz
- [`get_batch_DEGs()`](get_batch_DEGs.md) : Run pairwise DEG comparisons
  for all conditions except a reference
- [`correlate_genes_to_target()`](correlate_genes_to_target.md) :
  Calculate gene-wise correlation to target gene profile
- [`classify_timecourse_by_round()`](classify_timecourse_by_round.md) :
  Classify genes by multi-round monotonic time-course patterns
- [`get_turning_point()`](get_turning_point.md) : Count turning points
  in vector
- [`get_pc_contributors()`](get_pc_contributors.md) : Extract positive
  and negative contributors for a given PCA component

## Visualization

- [`ivolcano()`](ivolcano.md) : Interactive or static volcano plot
- [`saveplot()`](saveplot.md) : Save plots in multiple formats with
  standardized resolution
- [`plot_pca()`](plot_pca.md) : Plot PCA embedding
- [`plotSE_density()`](plotSE_density.md) : Plot intensity distribution
  for each sample
- [`plotCV_density()`](plotCV_density.md) : Plot CV distribution across
  conditions
- [`plotSE_missing_value()`](plotSE_missing_value.md) : Plot missing
  values per sample
- [`plotSE_protein_number()`](plotSE_protein_number.md) : Plot number of
  detected proteins per sample
- [`plot_gene_expression()`](plot_gene_expression.md) : Plot gene
  expression across samples or conditions
- [`plot_GO_dot1()`](plot_GO_dot1.md) : Dot plot for GO enrichment
  (style 1)
- [`plot_GO_dot2()`](plot_GO_dot2.md) : Dot plot for GO enrichment
  (style 2)
- [`plot_GO_dot3()`](plot_GO_dot3.md) : Dot plot for GO/Pathway output
  (style 3, generic)
- [`plot_FC_trend()`](plot_FC_trend.md) : Plot multi-round logFC trends
  for monotonic gene groups
- [`plot_deg_trends()`](plot_deg_trends.md) : Visualize DEG dynamic
  trends by Mfuzz cluster
- [`plot_heatmap_withline()`](plot_heatmap_withline.md) : Plot heatmap
  with row-wise summary line using ComplexHeatmap
- [`catable()`](catable.md) : Category table summarizer
- [`geom_mean()`](geom_mean.md) : Geometric mean
- [`auto_cluster_matrix_pca_one()`](auto_cluster_matrix_pca_one.md) :
  PCA-based clustering using DynamicTreeCut

## App and package utilities

- [`EasyProtein-package`](EasyProtein.md)
  [`EasyProtein`](EasyProtein.md) : EasyProtein: A comprehensive
  proteomics analysis toolkit
- [`launch_EasyProtein()`](launch_EasyProtein.md) : Launch EasyProtein
  Shiny App
- [`detect_species_from_symbol()`](detect_species_from_symbol.md) :
  Detect species (human or mouse) from gene symbols
